properties.name: fromParamSuffix
properties.label: From Parameter Suffix
properties.description: Filter name suffix for the From date, e.g. date_from

properties.name: toParamSuffix
properties.label: To Parameter Suffix
properties.description: Filter name suffix for the To date, e.g. date_to

properties.name: panelTitle
properties.label: Panel Title
properties.description: Leave empty to disable panel wrapping

properties.name: panelColumns
properties.label: Grid Columns
properties.description: Number of columns in the filter grid (default: 3)

properties.name: panelHierarchyHint
properties.label: Hierarchy Hint
properties.description: Text shown in panel header right side
